sections.title: Universal Compliance Checklist
sections.contentHtml:
A mature compliance programme for a Mexico marketplace platform must integrate the following controls across technical, legal, and operational functions.

AreaVerification Step
FrequencyAgent AMPI Status
Verify AMPI membership is current via AMPI chapter directory.On agency onboarding
NOM-247 PROFECO ContractConfirm agency's adhesion contract is registered with PROFECO.
On agency onboardingRFC Verification
Buyer, seller, and agent RFC obtained and valid with SAT.Per transaction
Restricted Zone CheckVerify property coordinates against SRE restricted zone boundary.
Per listingFideicomiso Flag
Flag listings in restricted zone as requiring fideicomiso for foreign buyers.Per listing
Ejido Land FlagVerify property is not ejido-classified via National Agrarian Registry (RAN).
Per listingListing Accuracy (NOM-247)
Confirm listing price, size, features, and availability are truthful and current.Per listing
Sold/Unavailable PurgeRemove or mark as unavailable any sold or withdrawn listings promptly.
Daily (automated)ISAI Rate Display
Display correct state ISAI rate in buyer cost calculator.Per listing by state
LFPIORPI KYCCollect and verify client identity and beneficial owner for transactions above UMA threshold.
Per transaction above thresholdAML Cash Restriction
Confirm no cash received above applicable UMA threshold.Per transaction
AML SAT ReportingFile activity report with SAT for qualifying transactions.
Per qualifying transactionPrivacy Notice (ARCO)
Valid Aviso de Privacidad published; ARCO rights mechanism operational.Live on site
NOM-247 AdvertisingAll portal and digital advertising reviewed for NOM-247 compliance.
Per campaignPre-Sale Disclosure
Pre-construction/pre-sale listings clearly labeled with expected delivery date.Per listing
IVA on Short-Term RentalIVA (16%) and ISH (state lodging tax) correctly disclosed for STR listings.
Per STR listing
